data.title: Ready Capital Corporation reported Q4 and full year 2025 financial results, with a webcast call scheduled for Feb. 27 at 8:30 am.
data.description: Ready Capital Corporation (NYSE: RC) revealed that it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the New York Stock Exchange ends trading on Thursday, February 26, 2026. The management team is set to conduct a webcast and conference call on Friday, February 27, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. This session aims to offer a business overview and delve into the financial performance for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: NextEra Energy and Exelon welcome PJM Board approval for a proposed ~220-mile, 765-kV transmission line project.
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida and Chicago on February 13, 2026, NextEra Energy Transmission, LLC, a subsidiary of NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE), and Exelon Corporation (Nasdaq: EXC) celebrated the approval by the PJM Board of Directors for their planned ~220-mile, 765-kV transmission line project.

data.title: Exact Sciences (NASDAQ: EXAS) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -362.5%, reporting EPS of $-0.21. Revenue increased by $164.96 million from the same period last year. [Word count: 48]
data.description: Exact Sciences (NASDAQ: EXAS) released its Q4 earnings report on Friday, February 13, 2026, at 04:05 PM. The report revealed that the company missed estimated earnings by -362.5%, posting an EPS of $-0.21 compared to the expected $0.08. Revenue saw a significant increase of $164.96 million from the previous year. In the previous earnings period, Exact Sciences had shown a different performance...

data.title: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. executives to attend Citi’s 2026 Global Property CEO Conference on March 1-4, 2026 in Florida. #SBRA #CITI
data.description: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. disclosed that key executives including Rick Matros, Chair and CEO; Michael Costa, CFO; Darrin Smith, CIO; and Lukas Hartwich, EVP of Finance, will be present at Citi’s 2026 Global Property CEO Conference from March 1-4, 2026, held at The Diplomat Beach Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Sabra (Nasdaq: SBRA) will participate in the event.

data.title: Amgen will present at Citi's 2026 Virtual Oncology Leadership Summit on Feb. 18 at 12:15 p.m. PT. Jean-Charles Soria to present.
data.description: A company based in Thousand Oaks, California, known as Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN), is set to participate in Citi's 2026 Virtual Oncology Leadership Summit. The event will take place on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 12:15 p.m. Pacific Time. Jean-Charles Soria, who holds the position of senior vice president of oncology in the global development division of Amgen, is scheduled to deliver a presentation.

data.title: White House pleased with 2 positive economic reports - strong job data and low inflation in January. Mixed overall outlook.
data.description: President Trump received positive news with strong jobs data for January, offset by lower inflation figures. The economy, however, presents a mixed outlook.

data.title: Immersion Corporation (Nasdaq: IMMR) gets Nasdaq letter for not meeting Filing Rule; seeks hearing for continued listing.
data.description: Immersion Corporation, a top haptics technology provider traded on Nasdaq under the symbol IMMR, disclosed that on February 10, 2026, they received a Staff Determination Letter from Nasdaq due to non-compliance with the Filing Rule (Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). This issue had been previously flagged by the Staff on August 20, 2025, September 29, 2025, and December [Year not mentioned].

data.title: First Bancshares, Inc. declares an annual cash dividend of $0.50 per share, payable on April 15, 2026.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, First Bancshares, Inc. revealed that the Board of Directors approved an annual cash dividend of $0.50 per share on the company’s common stock. The company, which acts as the holding company for Stockmens Bank located in Colorado Springs, Colorado, announced that the dividend will be distributed on April 15, 2026, to shareholders holding stock as of April 1, 2026.

data.title: Jet.AI adopts Rights Agreement to protect stockholders in takeovers, distributing one preferred share purchase right per common stock.
data.description: In Las Vegas, NV, on Feb. 13, 2026, Jet.AI Inc. (Nasdaq: JTAI) disclosed the implementation of a temporary stockholders rights agreement termed the “Rights Agreement” and declared a dividend of one preferred share purchase right for each outstanding common stock share. Through this, the company aims to ensure equitable treatment for all stockholders in case of a potential Company takeover and prevent unfair tactics to procure control without offering appropriate compensation. This move seeks to uphold the interests of all stockholders and facilitate the realization of their long-term investment value. While these rights do not obstruct takeovers, they prompt interested parties to engage in discussions with the Company’s Board of Directors before pursuing a takeover bid.

data.title: SRX Health Solutions Inc. reported fiscal Q1 2026 results. The company plans to acquire EMJ Crypto Technologies. Acquisition expected to close in first half of 2026.
data.description: Signed a definitive agreement to purchase EMJ Crypto Technologies (EMJX), a second-generation digital-asset treasury platform. The acquisition is expected to be finalized in the first half of 2026.

data.title: 4DMT granted 124,200 RSUs to 9 new non-executive employees on Feb 10, 2026 under the 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan.
data.description: 4D Molecular Therapeutics, a leading biotechnology company, revealed on February 10, 2026, that nine new non-executive employees were granted 124,200 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) by the compensation committee of the Company’s board of directors. These RSUs were awarded under the Company’s 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan, following Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market. This move aims to attract new talent to join the Company and contribute to its innovative approach to durable and disease-targeted therapeutics.

data.title: Orchestra BioMed issues stock options for 120,000 shares to 9 new hires on Feb 12, 2026 under Nasdaq rule. Vests over 4 years.
data.description: Orchestra BioMed Holdings, Inc. announced on February 13, 2026, that the Compensation Committee of their Board of Directors awarded stock options for 120,000 shares of the Company's common stock to nine recent hires on February 12, 2026. These options were granted under the Orchestra Biomed Holdings, Inc. 2025 New Hire Inducement Plan as a significant inducement for each new employee joining the company. The stock options given to each employee will vest over a span of four years, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Safe Bulkers, Inc. sell a 2012 Capesize class dry-bulk vessel, MV Michalis H, for $35.2 million by Q1 2026.
data.description: Today, Safe Bulkers, Inc. (NYSE: SB), a global marine drybulk transportation services company, revealed its plans to sell MV Michalis H, a 2012 Chinese-built Capesize class dry-bulk vessel. The sale agreement sets the gross price at $35.2 million, with the vessel scheduled for delivery in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: PAMT Q4 earnings report: Missed estimated earnings by -125.0%, reporting EPS of $-0.45. Revenue down $25.21 million.
data.description: PAMT (NASDAQ: PAMT) released its Q4 earnings report on Friday, February 13, 2026, at 03:00 PM. The report revealed that PAMT missed estimated earnings by -125.0%, with an EPS of $-0.45 compared to the estimated $-0.2. Revenue also saw a decrease of $25.21 million from the same period in the previous year. In the earlier quarter, the company had also missed expectations. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
